site.name: REMQUIP
hero.title: Canada's Next-Generation Heavy-Duty Parts Distributor
hero.subtitle: Wholesale Leaders in Heavy-Duty Brakes & Air Suspension Parts
about.title: Your Brakes & Suspension Heavy-Duty Parts Partner
about.description: Remquip is your trusted Canadian partner for heavy-duty truck and trailer parts, based in Quebec and proudly serving fleets, distributors, and OEMs nationwide since 2025.
about.hero.label: About REMQUIP
about.hero.title: Built for the Road. Engineered for Trust.
about.hero.subtitle: From our Quebec headquarters, we supply Canada's fleets with the heavy-duty brake and suspension parts they depend on — every day.
about.story.label: Our Story
about.story.title: From Industry Veterans to Industry Leaders
about.story.p1: REMQUIP was founded in 2025 by a team of heavy-duty parts industry veterans who saw an opportunity to modernize parts distribution in Canada. With decades of combined experience in fleet management, aftermarket distribution, and logistics, we set out to build something better.
about.story.p2: Based in Quebec City, we started with a clear mission: provide Canadian fleets and distributors with reliable access to premium brake and suspension components — faster, with better service, and at competitive prices.
about.story.p3: Today, REMQUIP serves hundreds of businesses across Canada, maintaining over 500 SKUs in stock across three strategic warehouse locations to ensure 48-hour delivery nationwide.
about.values.label: Our Values
about.values.title: What Drives Us Every Day
about.value.quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
about.value.quality.desc: Every part we sell is tested to meet or exceed OEM standards. We stand behind our products with comprehensive warranties.
about.value.speed.title: Speed & Reliability
about.value.speed.desc: With three strategically located warehouses, we deliver within 48 hours anywhere in Canada. No delays, no excuses.
about.value.partnership.title: True Partnership
about.value.partnership.desc: We build lasting relationships with our customers. Dedicated account managers, flexible payment terms, and priority support.
about.value.reach.title: National Reach
about.value.reach.desc: From coast to coast, our distribution network ensures every Canadian fleet has access to the parts they need.
about.timeline.label: Our Journey
about.timeline.title: Milestones
about.milestone.2025.desc: REMQUIP established in Quebec City with initial inventory of 200+ SKUs.
about.milestone.2025b.desc: Montreal distribution center opened, doubling our shipping capacity.
about.milestone.2026.desc: Product catalog expanded to over 500 active SKUs across all major categories.
about.milestone.2026b.desc: Third warehouse in Toronto to serve Ontario and Western Canada markets.
about.team.label: Our Team
about.team.title: The People Behind REMQUIP
about.team.ceo.name: Marc Dupont
about.team.ceo.desc: 20+ years in heavy-duty aftermarket. Former VP at a national distributor.
about.team.ops.name: Julie Martin
about.team.ops.desc: Logistics expert with fleet management background. Drives our 48h delivery promise.
about.team.sales.name: Pierre Gagnon
about.team.sales.desc: B2B sales specialist. Builds strategic partnerships with fleets and distributors.
about.team.logistics.name: Sarah Chen
about.team.logistics.desc: Supply chain professional ensuring inventory accuracy and fast order fulfillment.
about.cta.title: Ready to Partner with REMQUIP?
about.cta.desc: Join hundreds of Canadian businesses who trust REMQUIP for their heavy-duty parts needs.

legal.terms.title: Terms & Conditions
legal.terms.content:
These Terms and Conditions govern your use of the REMQUIP platform and purchase of products through our website. By placing an order, you agree to be bound by these terms.

All prices are listed in Canadian Dollars (CAD) unless otherwise specified. Prices are subject to change without notice. Orders are subject to acceptance and availability.

REMQUIP reserves the right to refuse or cancel any order at its discretion. Payment must be received in full before shipment of goods.

These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Province of Quebec, Canada.
legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.content:
REMQUIP is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

We collect information you provide directly, including name, email, shipping address, and payment information when placing orders. This information is used solely for order processing and customer service.

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties without your consent, except as required to fulfill your order.
legal.shipping.title: Shipping & Returns
legal.shipping.content:
REMQUIP ships across Canada and to select US destinations. Standard shipping is calculated at checkout based on weight and destination.

Orders over C$500 qualify for free shipping within Canada. Most orders ship within 1-2 business days from our Quebec warehouse.

Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for unused products in original packaging. A restocking fee of 15% may apply. Defective products are replaced at no charge.
legal.refund.title: Refund Policy
legal.refund.content:
Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days after we receive the returned product. Refunds are issued to the original payment method.

Custom orders and special-order items are non-refundable. Shipping costs are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error.
legal.cookie.title: Cookie Policy
legal.cookie.content:
REMQUIP uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences.

We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies to understand how visitors use our site. You can control cookie settings through your browser.
cookie.banner.title: Cookie Preferences
cookie.banner.description: We use cookies to enhance your industrial procurement experience, analyze site traffic, and provide secure authentication.
chat.title: Chat with us
chat.greeting: Hi! How can we help you today?
chat.faq.shipping_a: We offer free shipping on orders over C$500 across Canada. Standard delivery is 1–2 business days from our Quebec warehouse.
chat.faq.returns_a: Returns are accepted within 30 days in original packaging. Defective parts are replaced at no charge.
chat.faq.wholesale_q: How do I open a wholesale account?
chat.faq.wholesale_a: Apply for a wholesale account through our registration page. You'll get access to trade pricing and dedicated support within 24 hours.
chat.faq.stock_a: We maintain 500+ SKUs across three strategic warehouses. Most items ship same day.
chat.faq.contact_q: How can I contact your team?
chat.faq.contact_a: Reach us at our Contact page or call during business hours (Mon–Fri 8AM–5PM EST). We respond within 24 hours.
chat.faq.warranty_q: Do your parts come with a warranty?
chat.faq.warranty_a: All our parts are quality-tested and come with a comprehensive warranty meeting or exceeding OEM standards.
legal.about.title: About REMQUIP
legal.about.content:
REMQUIP is Canada's next-generation heavy-duty parts distributor, based in Quebec City and serving fleets, distributors, and OEMs nationwide since 2025.

We specialize in heavy-duty brakes and air suspension components for commercial trucks and trailers. Our commitment to quality, competitive pricing, and fast shipping sets us apart.

With 15+ years of combined industry experience, our team understands the demands of the heavy-duty transportation industry and delivers the parts you need, when you need them.
